targets.label: Gym Lifting

ai_coach.headline: No telemetry or logs synced yet today — proceed with the standard Gym Lifting plan and get data flowing.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, RHR, or body battery data has synced, so readiness can't be objectively assessed this morning. Train the scheduled Gym Lifting session as planned but self-monitor bar speed and joint feel closely in absence of biometric confirmation.
action_plan: Sync wearable and log last night's sleep before training so today's readiness can be evaluated.
Proceed with the scheduled full-body lifting session; treat working weights from your last logged session as the baseline to defend.
Hit 3.5-4.0 L water today; add electrolytes if this session runs hard/long.
Log today's gym session in Hevy immediately post-workout to keep PRs and load-tracking current.
Log meals in real time against the 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb / 68g fat target.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Target is 2750 kcal, 215g protein, 310g carbs, 68g fat for this Gym Lifting day — front-load carbs and protein around the training window to fuel the session and support recovery, and log intake as you go since nothing is recorded yet.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight entries or glide path data are available, so no comparison against the 24-week target of 83.0 kg can be made yet.
risk_flags: Zero biometric telemetry (sleep, HRV, RHR, battery) synced — readiness is unknown, train with caution and normal load caps.
No gym sessions logged yet (0/4 scheduled days) — adherence and PR tracking are currently blind.
No nutrition logged today — risk of missing the 2750 kcal / 215g protein target if not tracked in real time.

overview.summary: All core telemetry (weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, battery) is missing for today, so there's no data-driven read on overall state.
overview.suggestion: Sync your wearable and scale now so tomorrow's briefing has real numbers to work with.

plan.summary: No weight history or glide path entries exist yet against the 83.0 kg target, so progress vs. the 24-week arc can't be evaluated.
plan.suggestion: Log today's body weight to start populating the glide path comparison.

training.summary: Readiness and load scores are both null, and 0 of 4 scheduled gym days this week are logged — there's no basis to judge fatigue or accumulated load.
training.suggestion: Run today's lifting session at planned intensity but cap any weight increases until readiness data resumes, defaulting to last known working weights.

gym.summary: No recent Hevy session data is available, so the current position in the lifting split and last working weights are unknown.
gym.suggestion: Log today's session in Hevy with exact loads and reps so the next session has a concrete weight to defend or progress from.

sleep.summary: No sleep hours or stress/body-battery data were recorded for last night, so recovery status is unverified.
sleep.suggestion: Log tonight's sleep and note wind-down time so tomorrow's readiness call has real input.

nutrition.summary: Zero food has been logged today against the 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb / 68g fat target.
nutrition.suggestion: Log the first meal now and route 60% of today's carbs into the pre- and post-workout meals around the lifting session.
